name: Chocolate-Amaretto Cheesecake (Lf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. Crush chocolate wafers and sprinkle evenly in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan.
3. In a food processor, process cream cheese with sugar, cocoa powder, flour, amaretto, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth.
4. Add eggs and process just until blended.
5. Fold in semisweet chocolate morsels.
6. Pour the mixture over the crumbs in the pan.
7. Bake for 65 to 70 minutes or until set.
8. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
10. Remove sides of the pan and transfer cheesecake to a serving platter.
11. Garnish with chocolate curls, if desired.
Yield: 12 servings
